creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Works for me on current:

root@:~ # ping -s 3000 192.168.100.1
PING 192.168.100.1 (192.168.100.1): 3000 data bytes
3008 bytes from 192.168.100.1: icmp_seq=0 ttl=64 time=0.385 ms
3008 bytes from 192.168.100.1: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=0.366 ms
3008 bytes from 192.168.100.1: icmp_seq=2 ttl=64 time=0.365 ms
